build.buildCommand: if [ -f agent/pyproject.toml ]; then cd agent; fi; python -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu torch==2.10.0+cpu torchvision==0.25.0+cpu && pip install "vision-agents[elevenlabs,getstream,openai,ultralytics]==0.3.7" python-dotenv

deploy.startCommand: if [ -f agent/agent_yolo.py ]; then cd agent; fi; .venv/bin/python agent_yolo.py serve --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT
